title: nesopteris thysanostoma
intro:
Nesopteris thysanostoma, also known as the "thysanostoma fern," is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the extinct order of Mesozoic ferns. It is believed to have been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nesopteris thysanostoma include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Nesopteris thysanostoma have been reported, but due to its extinction, it is no longer available for modern use.
